allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\TREINAMENTO HTML\\src\\lib\\search.js" -Raw; $line = \($content -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'replace' }\); Write-Host "Line: $line"; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($line\); Write-Host "Hex: $\(\($bytes | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)")

PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { "gh: $\($gh.Source\)"; gh auth status } else { "gh NOT FOUND" }; "---"; $git = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($git\) { "git: $\($git.Source\)" })
